chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-694 of 2023 Constitutional Petition No. D-695 of 2023 Constitutional Petition No. D-696 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) Constitutional Petition No. D-694 of 2023 1. For order on Misc. No.3125/2023 2. For order on Misc. No.3126/2023 3. For hearing of main case Constitutional Petition No. D-695 of 2023 1. For order on Misc. No.3128/2023 2. For order on Misc. No.3129/2023 3. For hearing of main case Constitutional Petition No. D-696 of 2023 1. For order on Misc. No.3131/2023 2. For order on Misc. No.3132/2023 3. For hearing of main case 16.9.2025 None present for the petitioners -------------------------------- These are old petitions of 2023, which were last taken up on 03.2.2023, which is almost two and a half years ago, when none was present for the petitioners without intimation. In the last two and a half years the petitioners have failed to diligently pursue these petitions. Today, once again, none present for the petitioners without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing all these petitions, which are accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. Office to place a copy of this order in the connected petitions. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
